:::{.landing-footer}
:::{.landing-footer__meta}
By SciLifeLab Training Hub. Licensed under CC BY 4.0.

Built with Quarto and hosted on GitHub Pages.
:::

:::{.landing-footer__actions}
<a href="https://github.com/SciLifeLab-Training/scilifelab-training-template-staging" class="landing-footer__repo-link" aria-label="GitHub repository">
  <img src="img/icons/github.svg" alt="" class="landing-footer__repo-icon">
</a>
:::
:::
